notes: Hashes are SHA-256 of on-disk bytes at inventory time.
Raw and login-fail artifacts are gitignored; hashes still pin them for operators with local copies.
Never store password, cookie, ticket, employee, project, or attachment values in this file.
Raw CDP captures are local-only, gitignored, and required to remain mode 0600.

artifacts.source: Playwright 1.61 unauthenticated navigation to /WebTP/PurchaseRequisition
artifacts.description: Anonymous redirect chain: business host 302 → passport login page + static assets

artifacts.source: Playwright screenshot of unauthenticated login page
artifacts.description: Visual confirmation of passport login UI

artifacts.source: httpx failed login POST (no follow)
artifacts.description: 302 Object moved to / after bad credentials; superseded for success-login protocol

artifacts.source: httpx failed login POST with redirect follow
artifacts.description: Re-rendered login form with flag=0 and Chinese error text; not a success path

artifacts.source: GET https://passport.isstech.com/Login/JS/Index
artifacts.description: Passport login page client script (field UX, flag handling)

artifacts.description: ajaxSubmit used by PR Index filter/pager

artifacts.source: Chrome + Computer Use CDP capture of manual Passport POST and authenticated Portal response
artifacts.description: Credentials and cookies remain only in raw evidence; browser requests already carried .iPSA, so clean-session issuance is not established

artifacts.source: tools/redact_login_cdp.py applied to 20260715-login-attempt-01.cdp.json
artifacts.description: Credential field names, redacted redirect steps, Cookie names/attributes, and authenticated page signal only

artifacts.source: Derived from authenticated browser cookie jar (values stripped)
artifacts.description: Cookie names, domains, paths, flags only

artifacts.source: Normalized cookie metadata plus direct HTTP exclusion-probe results (values removed)
artifacts.description: Cookie metadata, browser-ticket HTTP replay, and evidence that .iPSA is necessary within the observed set

artifacts.source: Chrome Network export for authenticated PR page load (URLs/status only)
artifacts.description: Initial document/CSS/JS request list without bodies or cookies

artifacts.source: Passport login HTML with DomainUrl→Portal
artifacts.description: Login form field inventory for Portal return path

gaps.neededPath: runtime environment variables only; no credential artifact may be saved
gaps.reason: Browser CDP captured a credential POST and authenticated Portal response, but the browser already carried .iPSA; a clean-process credential login still needs runtime-only credentials

gaps.neededPath: redacted request templates derived from request-stage intercept-and-abort captures
gaps.reason: Create/save/submit/approve/adjust/revoke/delete/upload request bodies remain unobserved and must never be transmitted in CTF_SAFE

gaps.neededPath: a second authorized competition role plus read-only comparison evidence
gaps.reason: Cross-role authorization behavior cannot be established with the current account; all write-side IDOR probes remain prohibited
